allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-Command New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName \\"MIMO TODO 3000\\" -Direction Inbound -Action Allow -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 3000' -Verb RunAs -Wait")
Bash(mysql -u root -p123456 mimo_todo -e "ALTER TABLE schedules ADD COLUMN completed_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL AFTER completed;")

Bash(node -e "const mysql=require\('mysql2/promise'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:'localhost',user:'root',password:'123456',database:'mimo_todo'}\);await c.query\('ALTER TABLE schedules ADD COLUMN completed_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL AFTER completed'\);console.log\('completed_at 字段添加成功'\);await c.end\(\);}\)\(\)")

Bash(node -e "const mysql=require\('mysql2/promise'\);\(async\(\)=>{const c=await mysql.createConnection\({host:'localhost',user:'root',password:'123456',database:'mimo_todo'}\);await c.query\('ALTER TABLE schedules ADD COLUMN achievements JSON DEFAULT NULL AFTER completed_at'\);console.log\('achievements 字段添加成功'\);await c.end\(\);}\)\(\)")
